# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Sidecar
metadata:
  name: istio-sidecar
spec:
  egress:
  - ports:
    - number: 15000
      protocol: TCP
  proxyMetadata:
    envoy:
      admin:
        access_log_path: /dev/null
        access_log_stdout: false
        access_log_time_key: "time"
        admin:
          access_log_path: "/dev/null"
          access_log_stdout: false
          access_log_time_key: "time"
        cluster_manager:
          stats:
            exposed_endpoint: true
        extensions:
          static_resources:
            listeners:
            - name: listener_0
              filter_chains:
              - filters:
                - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                  typed_config:
                    "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.MarkIdentifiedFields
                    fields_to_clear:
                    - value: "envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager.config"
                      fields_match:
                        filter_name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                        sub_filter_name: stats
                    - value: "envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager.stats"
                      fields_match:
                        filter_name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                        sub_filter_name: config
                - name: envoy.filters.network.grpc_json_stats_v2
                  typed_config:
                    grpc_service:
                      stats:
                        exposed_endpoint: true
        http_filters:
        - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
          typed_config:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.MarkIdentifiedFields
            fields_to_clear:
            - value: "envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager.stats"
              fields_match:
                filter_name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                sub_filter_name: config
        static_resources:
          listeners:
          - name: listener_0
            filter_chains:
            - filters:
              - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.MarkIdentifiedFields
                  fields_to_clear:
                  - value: "envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager.config"
                    fields_match:
                      filter_name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                      sub_filter_name: stats
              - name: envoy.filters.network.grpc_json_stats_v2
                typed_config:
                  grpc_service:
                    stats:
                      exposed_endpoint: true
        static_resources:
          listeners:
          - name: listener_0
            filter_chains:
            - filters:
              - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                typed_config:
                  "@type": type.googleapis.com/udpa.type.v1.MarkIdentifiedFields
                  fields_to_clear:
                  - value: "envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager.stats"
                    fields_match:
                      filter_name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
                      sub_filter_name: config
    stats:
      exposed_endpoint: true
  proxyAdminPort: 15000

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: mesh
spec:
  hosts:
  - '*'
  http:
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /config_dump
      headers:
        x-envoy-expected-rq-timestamp:
          notPresent
    route:
    - destination:
        host: 'default'
      weight: 100
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /stats
      headers:
        x-envoy-expected-rq-timestamp:
          notPresent
    route:
    - destination:
        host: 'default'
      weight: 100
  - match:
    - uri:
        prefix: /clusters
      headers:
        x-envoy-expected-rq-timestamp:
          notPresent
    route:
    - destination:
        host: 'default'
      weight: 100

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: mesh
spec:
  host: '*'
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
